title: Rabafast
description: Rabafast is a multi-currency payment platform that enables merchants to do cross-border payouts, my responsibility was to build the dashboard which was a web based application that was used to manage the payments and the customers

title: Dot Business
description: Dot Business is a business banking platform that enables businesses to manage their finances, my responsibility was to build the dashboard which was a web based application that was used to manage the finances and the customers

title: Qshelter
description: Qshelter is a platform that enables businesses to manage their finances, my responsibility was to build the dashboard which was a web based application that was used to manage the finances and the customers

title: MailMaker AI
description: MailMaker AI is a modern, web-based email template builder designed to help users create responsive, high-quality emails without writing code. It leverages MJML (Mailjet Markup Language) under the hood to ensure that the generated HTML is compatible across all major email clients.
